case_title: FIGUEROA, BRENDA VS TACA INT'L AIRLINES, SOCIEDAD AEROLINEA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY FIGUEROA, BRENDA AS TO DEFENDANT TACA INT'L AIRLINES, SOCIEDAD AEROLINEA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-26-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PLAINTIFF REQUESTED FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER, APPROVED IFP EMAILED JULIE ABUSHARKH.
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO CT CORP AGT FOR SERVICE FOR TACA INT'L AIRLINES.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIGUEROA, BRENDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TACA INT'L AIRLINES, SOCIEDAD AEROLINEA $1,650.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,650.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT TACA INT'L AIRLINES, SOCIEDAD AEROLINEA HEARING SET FOR NOV-30-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF FIGUEROA, BRENDA

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY TACA INT'L AIRLINES, SOCIEDAD AEROLINEA SET FOR NOV-30-2007 IS CONTINUED TO JAN-04-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN 506. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK FANNY RAYRAY, NOT REPORTED. (506).

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY TACA INT'L AIRLINES, SOCIEDAD AEROLINEA IS GRANTED. DISMISS CASE WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO MEDIATED SETTLEMENT. NO PARTIES PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
